html:
RECOUP Travel Medicine Clinic

Plan Your Next Adventure with Confidence!

At RECOUP, we specialize in keeping travellers healthy and safe. Whether you're planning a backpacking trip, a family vacation, or a business trip abroad, our dedicated team of travel medicine experts is here to help you prepare.

Our Services

Pre-Travel Consultations

Our comprehensive consultations assess your health history, travel itinerary, and any specific concerns. During your visit, we will:

  • Review destination-specific health risks.
  • Discuss necessary vaccinations and medications.
  • Provide personalized health tips and resources to enhance your travel experience.

Vaccination Services

Stay protected with our wide range of vaccination services, including:

  • Routine and travel-specific vaccines such as:
    • Yellow Fever
    • Hepatitis A & B
    • Typhoid
    • Rabies
    • Japanese Encephalitis
  • Convenient on-site vaccinations with flexible scheduling to meet your needs.

Malaria Prevention

Our team will assess your risk based on your travel destination and:

  • Recommend appropriate prophylactic medications tailored to your itinerary.
  • Guide mosquito bite prevention strategies, including insect repellent and protective clothing.

Traveller's Diarrhea Management

Preventing and managing traveller's diarrhea is crucial for a safe trip. Our services include:

  • Education on safe food and water practices.
  • Recommendations for medications to carry, including over-the-counter options.
  • Advice on hydration and dietary adjustments if symptoms occur.

Health and Safety Education

We empower travellers with the knowledge to minimize health risks abroad. Our educational resources cover:

  • Local health risks and how to avoid them.
  • Safe practices for eating and drinking.
  • Emergency contacts and healthcare facilities at your destination.
  • Training in First Aid for common emergencies.

Targeted Nutritional Support for Travelers

  • Gut Health Support
  • Immune-boosting foods and hydration strategies.
  • Blood Sugar Balance During Travel
  • Post-Travel Recovery Nutrition

Human Factors and Ergonomics

  • Training in Ergonomics of Hybrid Work and Travel Ergonomics, including Flights, Cars and Motorbikes.
  • Guidance regarding prevention of jet lag, sleep disturbances and fatigue.
  • Instruction in exercises during travel and in hotels or client's sites.

Post-Travel Health Checks

After your travels, we offer follow-up consultations to:

  • Address any health concerns that may arise.
  • Administer necessary booster vaccinations based on your travel experiences.
  • Discuss potential exposure to infectious diseases and offer guidance on the next steps.

Travel Health Kits

Prepare for your journey with our customized travel health kits. Each kit can include:

  • Essential medications (antibiotics, anti-nausea, pain relief).
  • First aid supplies (band-aids, antiseptics).
  • Health information and emergency contact cards specific to your destination
  • Gut support items (digestive enzymes, electrolytes, rehydration sachets)..
  • Immune-boosting snacks and anti-inflammatory food kits.
  • Travel-safe superfoods and herbal teas.

Insurance and Documentation Support

Navigating travel insurance and health documentation can be complex. We provide:

  • Guidance on necessary vaccinations and health documents required by airlines or countries.
  • Assistance with understanding your travel insurance policy and coverage options.
  • Help in filing claims if needed due to travel-related health issues.

RECOUP Travel Medicine Team

  • Functional Medicine Physicians
  • Lifestyle Medicine Physicians
  • Rehabilitation Physicians
  • Other Specialist Physicians
  • Ayurveda Physicians
  • Naturopathy and Yoga Physicians
  • Nutritionists
  • Clinical Psychologists
  • Physiotherapists
  • Occupational Therapists
  • Ergonomists
  • Health Coaches
  • Nurses
  • Patient Care Coordinators
  • Other professionals, as required

Why Choose RECOUP Health?

  • Expert Team: Our highly trained professionals specialize in travel medicine, ensuring you receive the most accurate and up-to-date information for your travels.
  • Personalized Care: We understand that every traveller is unique. Our tailored approach considers your health needs, travel plans, and underlying health conditions.
  • Convenient Location: Located in central areas, we offer flexible appointment times to fit your busy schedule, making it easy to prioritize your health before travelling.
  • Commitment to Safety: Your well-being is our top priority. We stay informed about the latest health advisories and provide ongoing support to ensure your safety while exploring the world.

📅 Book Your Appointment Today!

Don't leave your health to chance. Schedule your consultation online or call us at [phone number]. Let's make your travel safe and enjoyable!

Stay healthy on your travels with RECOUP!
